review_comment: Didn't we have some unit tests for checking run slitting for other glyphs at some point? `CustomTextLayoutTests` or something? This code looks sensible to me but ¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯

We do, but it's related to the Run/LinkedRun manipulation. We don't have any for the rest of the analyzer and to add one for these methods would require me to stand up the world. So I'm going to punt.
consider function-level `try { ... } CATCH_RETURN();` since this is noexcept.
